install_msg: Thanks for installing SIN Server Hub. Use `[p]cog install sin-server-hub-cog sinserverhub` then `[p]load sinserverhub`.
short: SIN Corp game server info hub.
description: Red-DiscordBot cog for sharing game server status, IPs, passwords, workshop links, notes, join instructions, and restart alerts.
